text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
One evening, after a bit of shopping,
Matikanefukukitaru and I are walking through the
shopping district when...

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Oh... Look at all those people. Do you think a
fortune teller has set up shop or something?

text_block_list.name: Raffle Clerk
text_block_list.text:
Step right up and try your luck with our New
Year's raffle! This year's grand-prize is a hot
spring vacation for two!

text_block_list.name: Raffle Clerk
text_block_list.text:
First-prize winners get a deluxe carrot hamburger
steak! Second-prize winners get a bushel of
carrots! And third-prize winners can take home a
single carrot!

text_block_list.name: Raffle Clerk
text_block_list.text:
How about you over there with the daruma charm
on your head? Care to give it a spin?

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
A raffle? A game that tests our luck?! Mwahaha!
The gods must have wanted me to see this!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
It's like drawing a fortune slip with a prize
attached! There's no way we can pass this up!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Trainer, some change please... No, you have a
raffle ticket, don't you?!
choice_data_list: Yeah, I think I got one while we were shopping.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Wooo! Okay, let's join hands and fuse our
energies into one!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
With our luck combined, there's nothing to fear! I
just know it!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Our spiritual energies channeled as one, we reach
out and grasp the handle of the raffle spinner...

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: Hyaaaaah!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She belts out a rattling cry as we give it a strong
crank.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
A small plastic ball drops from the spinner's
opening...

text_block_list.name: Raffle Clerk
text_block_list.text:
Holy mackerel! We've got ourselves a grand-prize
winner! Come and get the coupon for your hot
spring vacation! Congratulations!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: You obtained: <itemname>

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Wooooo! Praise be! Receiving the grand-prize is
just like receiving a great blessing at the shrine!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
With both the gods and Buddha in this world, I
guess we reap double the rewards for good
deeds!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: Wahoo! Wahoo! Wa-wa-hurray!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I don't know where she came up with that chant,
but Matikanefukukitaru seems to be over the
moon.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Woooo! We really won! That means we can go
together!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
We just have to decide when. A lucky trip like this
needs to have an appropriately auspicious day.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
So it would probably be best to leave it up to the
fortune slips. What do you say, Trainer?
choice_data_list: Sure, let's leave it up to fate.
Sure, let's leave it up to fate.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
All right then! Onward to today's second lucky
draw!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
We head to a shrine to let the fortune slips
determine the date for our vacation.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The slips usually have a section on them devoted
to travel plans, so we decide to use that for
reference.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
All right, let's give this an unravel... And here we
are!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Now, what do we have here...

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: Gyahhhhh! What does this mean?!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
I can't believe this! It usually says something like
"the present time is fortuitous" or "a location in
the northeast would be favorable."

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
But look! It says, "You're gonna want to wait a
year—trust me. ♪"

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: Pretty direct for a fortune, don't you think?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
One year... I guess the gods want us to wait a
while.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Ah, what a shame. However, to ignore a direction
from the divine would be a grave transgression.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Good things come to those who wait, after all! I'm
sure there's a very good reason for the delay.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Trainer, it's only one year! Will you join me for
the hot springs when that time comes?

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Don't worry, the hot springs aren't going
anywhere! And if they did, I'd chase them down.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: Okay, it's a promise! I'm gonna hold you to it!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
And when that day comes, we'll soak in there for
hours on end and feast on the finest local
delicacies!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: Put 'er there, Trainer!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Clap!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The clasp of our handshake echoes through the
air. With a hot spring trip to look forward to,
Matikanefukukitaru's enthusiasm is at an all-time
high.

text_block_list.name: Raffle Clerk
text_block_list.text:
Looks like we have another first-prize winner!
Congratulations! You get one deluxe carrot
hamburger steak!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: You obtained: <itemname>

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Ooh! It's not the grand-prize, but this isn't half
bad! I'd compare it to pulling "good fortune" on a
fortune slip!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Hehehe! It's so packed with nutrients, just one
bite will probably take you straight to heaven.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
And the carrot's reddish hue looks awfully
auspicious...

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: Hmm... But it's still missing something.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
It's lacking the rich flavors befitting a New Year's
feast. If we want this hamburger steak to be even
more auspicious...

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: I've got it! Come with me!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I decide to go along with whatever
Matikanefukukitaru has in mind.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
We can use the kitchen here to make a cream
sauce to go on top of the hamburger steak!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Now it's ready! The reddish carrot and white
cream sauce together give it a celebratory flair!
That's a lucky color combination, you know!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
What joy! What bliss! All right, Trainer, let's dig
in!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
We enjoy the meal together. Her homemade
sauce really adds a rich, creamy depth to the dish!

text_block_list.name: Raffle Clerk
text_block_list.text:
We got a second-prize winner! It's your lucky day!
You're going home with a bushel of carrots!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: You obtained: <itemname>

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Carrots, eh? Well, the sheer number of them is
nothing to scoff at, so I'd say this is about the
same as "modest fortune" on a fortune slip.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
We should definitely be accepting them with
gratitude in our hearts.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: Still, it wouldn't do to keep these all to ourselves.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
I know! Trainer, why don't we go on a pilgrimage
of good fortune, sharing our blessings far and
wide?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And so, we go around handing out carrots to all
the Umamusume we meet.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
Thank you, Fukukitaru. I'll eat it during my break
at training.

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Oho! The heck do we have here? A carrot? Don't
mind if I do!

text_block_list.name: Nakayama Festa
text_block_list.text: I owe you one. And I always pay my debts.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: After handing out three carrots...

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Hey, wait just a second! At this rate, we'll be at
this until morning!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: Why don't we just eat the rest of them!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Cutting our pilgrimage short at three stops, we
gorge on the rest of the carrots.

text_block_list.name: Raffle Clerk
text_block_list.text:
Would you lookie here! You've won the
third-prize! Here's your carrot!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: You obtained: <itemname>

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Whaaat?! Just one measly carrot?! This must be
the work of the demon-goddess Kishimojin!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
If this were a fortune slip, maybe it would be
"modest fortune." Eh, on second thought, it's
more like... "meh fortune."

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I don't remember ever seeing "meh fortune" on
one of those slips before, but sure.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Still, even one carrot makes for a preeetty good
snack. Let's dig in, Trainer.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
We split the carrot in half and enjoy a small snack
together.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
All finished? Okay. Let us bring our humble feast
to a close, and celebrate with the traditional
single clap!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: Aaaand...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Clap!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The sound of our clap echoes through the air. It
somehow makes the whole event feel a bit more
special.

text_block_list.name: Raffle Clerk
text_block_list.text:
Ohhh, tough luck! Looks like you pulled a blank
one! Take this pack of tissues as a consolation
prize.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: You obtained: <itemname>

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Tissues?! Is this the malady that has been
forewarned for centuries—do we have a "dud" on
our hands?!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: This is just like receiving "misfortune" on a fortune slip! No, make that "great misfortune"! How could this happen to us?! Waaaaah!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
All right, let's turn this around and make paper
dolls out of them!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
To ward off evil spirits. They'll take the brunt of
the bad luck for us.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
There's no time to waste! Let's get to folding!
Chop-chop!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
We make paper dolls out of all the tissues. Their
faces are crumpled with misfortune.
